title: Contributor Code of Conduct
text: contributors maintainers project, pledge respect people contribute reporting issues, posting feature requests, updating documentation, submitting pull requests patches, activities. committed making participation project harassment-free experience everyone, regardless level experience, gender, gender identity expression, sexual orientation, disability, personal appearance, body size, race, ethnicity, age, religion. Examples unacceptable behavior participants include use sexual language imagery, derogatory comments personal attacks, trolling, public private harassment, insults, unprofessional conduct. Project maintainers right responsibility remove, edit, reject comments, commits, code, wiki edits, issues, contributions aligned Code Conduct. Project maintainers follow Code Conduct may removed project team. Instances abusive, harassing, otherwise unacceptable behavior may reported opening issue contacting one project maintainers. Code Conduct adapted Contributor Covenant (https://www.contributor-covenant.org), version 1.0.0, available https://contributor-covenant.org/version/1/0/0/.

what: Quick instructions for AI coding agents working on ggsegDesterieux
title: Quick instructions for AI coding agents working on ggsegDesterieux
text: ggseg 2.0 atlas package providing brain atlas data ggseg ecosystem. data-package custom functions.

title: Quick instructions for AI coding agents working on ggsegDesterieux
text: data/*.rda – Unified ggseg_atlas objects (2D + 3D one object) R/data.R – Roxygen2 documentation atlas R/ggsegDesterieux-package.R – Package-level docs, imports ggseg.formats R/sysdata.rda – Internal palette data (brain_pals) data-raw/ – Scripts generated/converted atlas data

title: Quick instructions for AI coding agents working on ggsegDesterieux
text: package depends ggseg.formats provides ggseg_atlas class. atlas objects work ggseg::geom_brain() (2D) ggseg3d::ggseg3d() (3D).

title: Quick instructions for AI coding agents working on ggsegDesterieux
text: Update docs: devtools::document() Run tests: devtools::test() (testthat edition 3, describe/style) Full check: devtools::check() Build pkgdown site: pkgdown::build_site()

title: Quick instructions for AI coding agents working on ggsegDesterieux
text: code comments except necessary workarounds Roxygen2 markdown enabled Tests use describe/BDD style vdiffr visual regression NEWS.md tracks user-facing changes (CI/pkgdown changes) URLs point ggseg GitHub org (LCBC-UiO)

what: Destrieux Atlas for the ggseg Ecosystem
title: Destrieux Atlas for the ggseg Ecosystem
text: package contains dataset plotting Desterieux cortical atlas ggseg ggseg3d. Desterieux, Fischl, Dale,& Halgren (2010) Neuroimage. 53(1): 1–15. doi: 0.1016/j.neuroimage.2010.06.010

title: Destrieux Atlas for the ggseg Ecosystem
text: recommend installing ggseg-atlases ggseg r-universe: can install released version version GitHub :
code: # Enable this universe options(repos = c(     ggsegverse = 'https://ggsegverse.r-universe.dev',     CRAN = 'https://cloud.r-project.org'))  # Install some packages install.packages('ggsegDesterieux') # install.packages("remotes") remotes::install_github("LCBC-UiO/ggsegDesterieux")

title: Destrieux Atlas for the ggseg Ecosystem
text: basic example shows solve common problem:
code: library(ggsegDesterieux) library(ggseg) library(ggplot2)  plot(desterieux) +   theme(legend.position = "bottom",         legend.text = element_text(size = 7)) +   guides(fill = guide_legend(ncol = 3)) library(ggseg3d) library(dplyr)  ggseg3d(atlas = desterieux_3d) %>%    pan_camera("right lateral")

title: Destrieux Atlas for the ggseg Ecosystem
text: FreeSurfer aparc.a2009s annotation files (lh.aparc.a2009s.annot, rh.aparc.a2009s.annot) data-raw/ copied fsaverage5 subject distributed FreeSurfer (v7.4.1), located $FREESURFER_HOME/subjects/fsaverage5/label/. Reference: Destrieux C, Fischl B, Dale , Halgren E (2010). Automatic parcellation human cortical gyri sulci using standard anatomical nomenclature. NeuroImage, 53(1), 1-15. doi:[10.1016/j.neuroimage.2010.06.010](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.neuroimage.2010.06.010) Please note ‘ggsegDesterieux’ project released Contributor Code Conduct. contributing project, agree abide terms.

title: Destrieux Cortical Atlas — desterieux
text: Brain atlas Destrieux cortical parcellation (aparc.a2009s) 75 regions per hemisphere. Contains 2D polygon geometry ggseg::geom_brain().

title: Destrieux Cortical Atlas — desterieux
Destrieux Cortical Atlas — desterieux
text: ggseg.formats::ggseg_atlas object (cortical).

title: Destrieux Cortical Atlas — desterieux
text: Destrieux C, Fischl B, Dale , Halgren E (2010). Automatic parcellation human cortical gyri sulci using standard anatomical nomenclature. NeuroImage, 53(1), 1-15. doi:10.1016/j.neuroimage.2010.06.010

title: Destrieux Cortical Atlas — desterieux

what: ggsegDesterieux: Destrieux Atlas for the 'ggseg' Ecosystem — ggsegDesterieux-package
title: ggsegDesterieux: Destrieux Atlas for the 'ggseg' Ecosystem — ggsegDesterieux-package
text: Destrieux cortical atlas (aparc.a2009s) 'ggseg' ecosystem. Provides 'ggseg_atlas' object 2D polygon geometry use 'ggseg'.

title: ggsegDesterieux: Destrieux Atlas for the 'ggseg' Ecosystem — ggsegDesterieux-package
text: Maintainer: Athanasia Mo Mowinckel .m.mowinckel@psykologi.uio.(ORCID) Authors: Didac Vidal-Pineiro d.v.pineiro@psykologi.uio.(ORCID)

title: ggsegDesterieux 2.0.0
text: desterieux now ggseg_atlas object (ggseg.formats) containing 2D 3D data. separate desterieux_3d object removed. Use ggplot() + ggseg::geom_brain(atlas = desterieux) 2D plots ggseg3d::ggseg3d(atlas = desterieux) 3D plots – object. ggseg.formats now hard dependency (Depends). Package URLs updated LCBC-UiO ggseg GitHub organisation.

title: ggsegDesterieux 1.0.01
text: adapted atlas ggseg >= 1.6.0 Added NEWS.md file track changes package.
